record.field:
Dear {{ object.partner_id.name or object.contact_name or 'Customer' }},

Thank you for your inquiry regarding freight services. In order to provide you with an accurate quotation, we kindly request the following additional details:

  • Commodity: Please provide a description of the goods to be shipped.
  • Weight (KGS): Total gross weight of the shipment.
  • Volume (CBM): Total volume of the shipment.
  • Dimensions: Length x Width x Height of the cargo/packages.
  • Number of Pallets/Packages: Total quantity of handling units.
  • Pickup/Delivery Address: Full address for collection and delivery (if applicable).
  • Preferred Incoterm: e.g. EXW, FOB, CIF, etc.
  • Special Requirements: Any hazardous goods, temperature control, or other special handling needs.

Please provide the above information at your earliest convenience so we can prepare a competitive quotation for you.

Should you have any questions, please do not hesitate to contact us.

Best regards,
